rationale: Adds a single table row to README.md inserting Zapier Benchmarks into the Model Ranking → Comprehensive subsection, positioned alphabetically after Yupp Leaderboard as the PR body states. The row follows the existing pipe-delimited column format with name+link and a description sentence. Sits in negatives/closed-without-merge bucket so a human reviewer chose not to merge, but the diff itself is a clean directory-style addition matching the PR description with no detectable cheat pattern; rejection is likely an editorial scope decision rather than a defect in the change.
